entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the host plant for nodulating bacteria

entities.name: BRADYRHIZOBIUM SP. (CICER)
entities.description: Bacteria that nodulate chickpea and are specific to it

entities.name: CROSS INOCULATION AFFINITY
entities.description: The ability of bacteria to inoculate members of different cross-inoculation groups

entities.name: CHICKPEA GENOTYPES
entities.description: Specific chickpea varieties including ICC 4918, ICC 196, and ICC 5003

entities.name: YEAST-EXTRACT MANNITOL AGAR
entities.description: A growth medium containing bromothymol blue used to observe bacterial acidity

entities.name: ACIDITY
entities.description: The pH characteristic of bacteria, described as acidic or neutral

entities.name: ANTIBIOTIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent tolerance of bacterial strains to low levels of antibiotics and antimetabolites

entities.name: ANTISERA PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of attempting to produce antisera from bacterial strains

entities.name: ANTIBODY TITER
entities.description: The level of antibody concentration resulting from antisera production
